title: malus domestica var. coccineus
intro: Malus domestica var. coccineus, also known as the Redstem Crabapple, is a variety of apple tree that is native to Eastern Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Malus domestica var. coccineus include reducing fever and alleviating digestive issues, as well as acting as a natural antioxidant. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and are used to treat various health conditions, including respiratory issues and skin irritations.
